submission_name: SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Byte-PPM Mixer (no TTT)
author: Rafael Mosquera
lineage: PR #1493 (bigbag) — 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals + score-first TTT
PR #1795 (OE-GOD) — byte-PPM mixer + legal causal gate
key_innovation: Adopts the eval-time byte-level PPM-D order-4 mixer (PR #1795) on top of bigbag's PR #1493 neural stack, with a strict-legal outcome-independent adaptive-lambda gate. Training is unchanged.

compliance.ppm_causality: score-before-update on every byte; gate cf computed from PPM tables BEFORE looking up observed byte's count (prefix-only)
